title: oncidium incurvum
intro: Oncidium incurvum, also known as the bent or curved oncidium, is a species of orchid that is native to Central and South America. This plant is known for its unique, curved inflorescence that blooms with white flowers, which are rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Oncidium incurvum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Oncidium incurvum typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
